estimated_runtime: 2-5 hours for one disk cache and four 100-epoch approximately 3.96M-parameter fits on one A6000; watcher is authoritative
claim_scope: seventh fixed-key PRESENT r3 selected-eight-output SPN-ResCNN hybrid attribution; not r4 evidence, full-ciphertext recovery, broad cross-key statistics, or SOTA
